source: Trivy image reports for OCR production and OCR CI images
policy: Only vulnerabilities without FixedVersion may be accepted here. Fixable MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL image findings remain blocked by scripts/ci/run-sca.sh.
reason: The listed Debian package families currently have no FixedVersion in the vendor feed. They are tracked as accepted risk until Debian publishes a fix or the package leaves the OCR images.
compensating_controls: OCR runs as non-root user ittm in the production image.
OCR and gateway services are internal to the Compose network; only nginx is published.
OCR CORS is disabled by default and wildcard origins are rejected.
Uploads are capped at 128 MiB; decoded images are capped at 80 MP; PDFs are capped at 100 pages and 6000 px render size.
The SCA workflow rebuilds and rescans images weekly and on workflow_dispatch.
